name: @para/ui-preprocess
description: Preprocessor for `.pui` Para UI components. Currently runs as a Svelte preprocessor that lets `<script lang="pts|parabun|pjs">` blocks in `.svelte` AND every script block in `.pui` files use Para syntax (pure, ..!, ..&, ..=, |>, signal, derived, effect, match). The Svelte-substrate is a near-term implementation choice; `.pui` is the durable user-facing surface. Pre-release: API may change before 0.1.0.
